# Badlaav Foundation

> Badlaav Foundation is a registered nonprofit trust in Dehradun, Uttarakhand, working since 2019 inside government Child Care Institutions to help children in care live with dignity and become self-reliant.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Badlaav Foundation does and how to support the work.
- [About](/about): Our story, mission, and registrations since 2019.
- [Our Model](/our-model): How the programme works inside Child Care Institutions.
- [Care](/care): The day-to-day care and support children receive.
- [Dagdya](/dagdya): The Dagdya programme and its focus.
- [Camp Infinity](/camp-infinity): Annual outing and the leadership camp at Tilwari.
- [Stories](/stories): Stories from the children and the work.
- [Support](/support): Ways to donate, give CSR, and partner with us.
- [Get Involved](/get-involved): Volunteer and partnership opportunities.
- [Certificate](/certificate): Our registrations and compliance certificates.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): How we handle personal data, aligned with India's DPDP Act.
- [Refund Policy](/refund): How donations and genuine transaction errors are handled.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms governing use of this site and donations.
